subject: Son Goku in base form, wearing his orange gi, one hand extended forward in an energized stance
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: A spiky-haired humanoid figure wearing an orange martial arts gi stands with one arm extended forward toward the viewer. Blue energy crackles around the figure's body and the extended hand. The figure's expression is confident and determined. The background is a bright blue-white energy field suggesting a powered-up state. The card is a double-faced leader card; the image depicts the base form side (Son Goku), which flips to Super Saiyan 3 upon transformation.
foreground: spiky-haired figure in orange gi with hand extended, blue energy crackling around them
emotion: confident determination, combat readiness, focused intensity
